g.onclick: sendPrompt('How are S3 object keys structured?')
g.text: object key — looks like a path, is just a name

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kind of files should I store in S3?')
g.text: database backup — up to 5 TB per object

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does S3 static website hosting work?')
g.text: static website — served directly from S3

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I store Terraform state in S3?')
g.text: remote Terraform state — shared by team

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does S3 achieve 11 nines of durability?')
sendPrompt('How does an EC2 instance access S3?')
sendPrompt('How does a developer upload files to S3?')
sendPrompt('How do I make an S3 object publicly accessible?')
sendPrompt('What is an S3 presigned URL?')
sendPrompt('How do I restrict S3 access to specific AWS services?')
sendPrompt('What is S3 versioning and when should I enable it?')
